statement.en: Converging Advances in Membrane Distillation: Materials Innovation, Computational Modeling, and Energy Integration for Sustainable Desalination
statement.summary: Converging Advances in Membrane Distillation: Materials Innovation, Computational Modeling, and Energy Integration for Sustainable Desalination

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future-dated or recent submission) in an emerging field (membrane distillation + AI). The axiom presents synthesized claims across materials science, computational modeling, and energy systems that require empirical validation and peer review. Components are individually testable but their integrated convergence is provisional and under active development.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 物質と計算と動力が一つに絡み合い、純粋さへ収束する。
